name: Sauteed Garlic, Red Peppers, Etc Polenta
recipeIngredient: 1 Swiss Chard (10 to 12 oz), stems removed
3 Red, gold, or orange bell peppers, halved lengthwise and seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the water into a saucepan. Add salt and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Gradually add the polenta to the boiling water, stirring constantly until fully incorporated.
3. Reduce the heat and cook for 40 to 45 minutes, stirring frequently. The polenta is done when it pulls away slightly from the sides of the pan.
4. While cooking the polenta, wash greens thoroughly and cut into strips. Dry well in a salad spinner or gather in a cloth and roll dry.
5. Cut peppers in half lengthwise and remove seeds. Slice thinly.
6. Heat olive oil in a large skillet. Add garlic and sauté for 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Add the pepper slices and greens. Sprinkle with salt, reduce heat, cover pan, and cook for 3 to 4 minutes until greens are limp but still colored.
8. Remove cover and continue cooking until greens have reduced in volume.
9. When polenta is ready, stir in butter, cheese, salt, and pepper. Serve immediately, topped with sauteed greens and peppers. Serves 4.
